route.purpose: Implement and validate inert local reporting-production boundary controls without analytical mutation, publication, external delivery, or canonical promotion

invariants: historical Wave 0 Operational Contract remains immutable
Reporting may adapt presentation but cannot mutate analytical meaning, lineage, evidence relationships, scope, risk inheritance, attribution, limitations, or uncertainty
natural-language semantic equivalence is never self-certified
completion_criteria: typed Evidence, Analysis, Freeze, Requirement, Projection, Production, Completeness, and Manifest objects exist and validate fail-closed
all prior v40 candidate controls pass with active fixtures using this contract and historical fixtures preserving the old contract binding
v39 local-call verification and the 5.6 bridge validator pass
report projection preserves structured claims, lineage, uncertainty, limitations, attribution, risk inheritance, and claim ceiling
every required analytical item reconciles to a substantive standalone artifact and every analytical report element resolves to frozen analysis and evidence
package reopen, manifest, per-file hash, completeness, and lineage gates pass against reopened content
Human Gate promotion and return behavior is non-bypassable and runtime-generated approval is rejected
a Wave 1 reporting-production receipt records verification evidence and the absent real insider-threat corpus as an operational-validation blocker
CONTROL_IMPLEMENTED is distinguished from OPERATIONALLY_VALIDATED and no publication or promotion is inferred
stop_conditions: Human Gate becomes unresolved or is bypassed
evidence, analysis, claim, lineage, uncertainty, limitation, attribution, or risk inheritance mutation
analytical inventory or reporting requirement omission
placeholder or commentary substitutes for requested analytical content
package integrity, standalone review, or reopened-content reconciliation fails
test failure cannot be bounded to candidate work
unknown production condition cannot be safely bounded
escalation_triggers: canonical uncertainty or Git head change
user correction changes a reporting requirement or completion criterion
natural-language semantic equivalence cannot be established
report projection requests an undeclared transformation
reporting discovers missing analysis, evidence, denominator, lineage, or source context
route-specific escalation order cannot be preserved
claim ceiling pressure or framework-mapping overclaim
real insider-threat corpus is required for an operational-validation claim
publication, external delivery, Git push, or v40 promotion is requested
repeated non-progressing transition or Logic Freeze marker
